owner_operator_stated: Record entity 'RAED I OWEISI, DMD, PC' is NPI-registered at 15856 Wolf Rd, Orland Park, IL 60467 with phone 708-737-7365 (per npino.com NPI directory), operating publicly as 'Achieve Dental' under Dr. Raed Oweisi, DDS. However, this record's phone number (708) 460-6666 is independently corroborated as belonging to a DIFFERENT practice - 'Orland Dental Wellness Center', led by Dr. Wook Kim, DDS - also listed at 15856 (S) Wolf Rd, Orland Park, IL 60467. Two differently-named/owned practices with different phone numbers share the same street address; the specific phone in this record maps to Kim's practice, not to Oweisi's.
notes: Vendor hint domain 'Achievedental.Net' does not match either identified site. Address 15856 (S) Wolf Rd, Orland Park is shared by two differently-owned dental practices with different phone numbers: Achieve Dental (Dr. Raed Oweisi, phone 708-737-7365 per NPI registry) and Orland Dental Wellness Center (Dr. Wook Kim, phone 708-460-6666, exact match to this record). Could not confirm which suite/entity corresponds to the record's provider_count=2 without guessing; treated as ownership conflict per the successor rule rather than assigning a website.

public_practice_name: Supreme Dental Care of Orland Park
owner_operator_stated: Dr. Maha Karar, DMD (University of Connecticut School of Dental Medicine, 2006) is the lead dentist; matches record name 'Karar Maha DMD' exactly. Dr. Lazma Deeb also practices there.
notes: Address (16141 S La Grange Rd, Orland Park, IL 60467) and phone (708-942-5588) both corroborated directly on the practice's own website. Independent single-location practice, no DSO/group affiliation stated. No careers or hiring page found on site.

owner_operator_stated: Third-party directories (PatientConnect365, Yelp, Healthgrades, WebMD) consistently identify Dr. Terrence Graff, DDS as sole owner/operator at 10741 165th St, Orland Park, IL 60467, phone (708) 364-1155 - matches record name and phone exactly. No conflicting entity found at this address/phone.
notes: Own-domain website terrencegraffdds.com found via search but connection refused on 3 separate attempts (https root, http root, /contact-us) - treated as dead/unreachable. No conflict with the named entity; third-party listings agree on name/address/phone, but no live corroborated site could be loaded so no hiring/roster info beyond the owner's name is available.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Sawsan Asfour, DDS is CEO/owner (matches record name ASFOUR DENTAL INC). Practice operates as multi-location independent group under the public name 'Orland Advanced Dentistry' with locations in Orland Park, Worth, and Palos Hills, IL - 8 dentists listed in total.
notes: Address (11315 W 143rd St, Orland Park, IL 60467) and phone (708-364-0900) both corroborated directly on the practice's own website. Multi-location independent practice (not identified as part of a larger DSO), 3 IL locations total. Careers page checked (/careers) returned 404 - none found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Peter March, DDS is owner; matches record name 'March, Peter J DDS' exactly. Third-generation family practice founded 1955 by his grandfather Dr. James J. March; Peter took over in 1984. Associates Dr. Edmund March and Dr. Yuhan Sun also practice there.
notes: Address (517 S Governors Hwy, Peotone, IL 60468) and phone (708-258-6281, listed as 'current patients' line) both corroborated on the practice's own website. Independent family-owned practice, not part of a DSO. A Job Opportunities page exists but lists no specific current openings - only a general 'let us know if interested' invitation, so not scored as hiring_page_found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Kevin L. Fatland, DDS is owner and general dentist (Southern Illinois University School of Dental Medicine, 1999). Associate Dr. William Williams recently joined after retiring from his own 30+ year practice; Dr. Lindbergh Norris, DDS also practices there.
notes: Address (615 E 162nd St, South Holland, IL 60473) and phone (708-331-1900) both corroborated directly on the practice's own website.
